name: Git Worktree Sandbox — Create
description: Create a git worktree sandbox for an agent. Args: name, repo_path, branch.

SANDBOX_DIR.description: Root directory where sandboxes are created

repo_path.description: Absolute path to the git repo

branch.description: Branch name to create or use in the worktree

executor_template.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, subprocess, os
args = json.load(sys.stdin)
name = args['name']
repo_path = args['repo_path']
branch = args['branch']
sandbox_base = '${SANDBOX_DIR}'
os.makedirs(sandbox_base, exist_ok=True)
sandbox_path = os.path.join(sandbox_base, name)
if os.path.exists(sandbox_path):
    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'path': sandbox_path, 'message': 'already exists'}))
    sys.exit(0)
result = subprocess.run(['git', '-C', repo_path, 'worktree', 'add', '-B', branch, sandbox_path, 'HEAD'], capture_output=True, text=True)
if result.returncode == 0:
    print(json.dumps({'success': True, 'path': sandbox_path, 'branch': branch}))
else:
    print(json.dumps({'success': False, 'error': result.stderr.strip()}))
"
